item.title: 埃隆·马斯克力挺"JD·万斯2.0"，部分共和党人对此存疑
item.description:
迄今为止，马斯克超级政治行动委员会的资金对肯塔基州竞选的影响甚微。

【原文：

So far, Musk’s super PAC money has done little to sway a Kentucky race.

】

item.title: 美国稀土公司即将收购圆顶矿床剩余股权
item.description: 据知情人士透露，美国稀土公司正计划通过全股票交易收购得克萨斯州某稀土矿床剩余少数股权，该交易估值约为7300万美元。【原文：USA Rare Earth Inc. is planning to acquire the remaining minority interest of a Texas rare earth deposit in an all-stock transaction that values the deal at about $73 million, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 中国将稀土、机器人纳入制造业优先发展领域
item.description: 中国承诺加倍投入高端科技产品生产，以巩固其制造业大国地位，尽管北京的雄心在外国首都引发警觉。【原文：China pledged to double down on the production of high-end tech goods to bolster its status as a manufacturing powerhouse, even as Beijing’s ambition raises alarms in foreign capitals.】

item.title: 欧元下跌凸显能源冲击是最大脆弱点
item.description: 欧元汇率持续走低，油价与天然气价格的飙升凸显了欧洲的脆弱性：当能源成本攀升时，该地区的贸易收支状况恶化，而欧元汇率往往会反映这种压力。【原文：The euro is sliding as a surge in oil and natural gas prices calls attention to Europe’s vulnerability: when energy gets expensive, the region’s trade balance deteriorates and the currency tends to reflect the pain.】

item.title: 莫迪罕见谈及中东局势，美军击沉伊朗军舰
item.description: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪表示，军事冲突——无论是在乌克兰还是中东——都无法解决问题。这是美国在斯里兰卡海岸击沉伊朗军舰后，他首次公开发表相关言论。【原文：Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi said military conflict — whether in Ukraine or the Middle East — cannot resolve problems, in his first public remarks since the US sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka’s coast.】

item.title: 英伟达合作伙伴鸿海全球人工智能建设销售额攀升22%
item.description: 鸿海精密工业股份有限公司2026年前两个月营收增长21.6%，凸显了英伟达公司服务器在全球人工智能发展中的关键需求。【原文：Hon Hai Precision Industry Co.’s revenue rose 21.6% in the first two months of 2026, underscoring demand for the Nvidia Corp. servers vital to global AI development.】

item.title: 英国2月住宅建设放缓加剧，PMI数据显示
item.description: 一项备受关注的调查显示，英国2月份建筑活动意外加速下滑，其中住宅建设尤为疲软。【原文：UK construction activity unexpectedly declined at a sharper pace in February, according to a closely watched survey, with housebuilding particularly weak.】

item.title: 印度汽车制造商推迟中东地区发货，伊朗战争阻碍出口
item.description: 知情人士透露，随着地区紧张局势升级导致海运路线中断、运费上涨，多家印度汽车制造商正推迟向中东和北非地区的发货。【原文：A clutch of Indian automakers is delaying shipments to the Middle East and North Africa, people familiar with the matter said, as escalating regional tensions upend sea routes and drive up freight costs.】

item.title: 孟加拉国准备削减开支以应对能源供应中断
item.description: 据一位高级政府官员透露，随着中东冲突不断升级，孟加拉国正准备减少向加油站的石油供应，以期延长现有储备的使用期限。【原文：Bangladesh is preparing to reduce deliveries to petrol pumps as the country tries to stretch existing reserves in the face of an escalating conflict in the Middle East, according to a senior government official.】

item.title: 安盛投资管理、KKR、淡马锡旗下公司等竞购大华银行资产管理公司
item.description: 据知情人士透露，安盛投资管理公司、KKR公司以及淡马锡控股旗下的Seviora公司正竞购大华银行的资产管理业务部门。【原文：Amundi SA, KKR & Co. and Temasek Holdings Pte’s Seviora unit are bidding for United Overseas Bank Ltd.’s asset management arm, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 印度基础设施贷款机构NaBFID计划设立5亿美元股权基金
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度国家基础设施与发展融资银行（NaBFID）计划筹集约5亿美元，用于设立其首个股权基金，以增强该行支持全球增长最快主要经济体基础设施项目的能力。【原文：India’s National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID) is planning to raise about $500 million to create its first equity-focused fund, according to people familiar with the matter, bolstering its capacity to support infrastructure projects in the world’s fastest-growing major economy.】

item.title: 油价85美元令尼日利亚获益，刚果损失最大
item.description: 彭博经济研究指出，美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争后油价飙升，仅会改善撒哈拉以南非洲地区三个经济体的经常账户余额，其余多数国家将遭受冲击。【原文：The surge in oil prices following the US and Israel’s war on Iran will improve the current account balance of just three sub-Saharan African economies, while most others will suffer, according to Bloomberg Economics.】

item.title: 中国隐形眼镜制造商慕迪据称正考虑以10亿美元出售公司
item.description: 知情人士透露，上海慕迪科技有限公司正考虑出售事宜，此次交易可能使这家彩色隐形眼镜制造商的估值达到约10亿美元。【原文：Shanghai Moody Technology Co. is considering a sale that could value the colored contact lens maker at about $1 billion, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 高盛前CEO劳埃德·布兰克费恩谈为何不发推文
item.description:
高盛之后的人生。

【原文：

And life after Goldman.

】

item.title: 零散话题：劳埃德·布兰克费恩谈为何不发推文（播客）
item.description: 劳埃德·布兰克费恩担任高盛首席执行官逾十年，乘着交易热潮将这家传奇投行推向巅峰，并引领其度过2008年金融危机。在其新回忆录《华尔街智慧：进入高盛并立足高盛》中，他讲述了自己从布鲁克林公共住房到华尔街顶峰的奋斗历程。 那么他如今在做什么？又如何看待当今的市场与金融？本期节目中，我们将探讨去全球化与华尔街、人工智能与科技带来的威胁。【原文：Lloyd Blankfein was CEO of Goldman Sachs for more than a decade, riding the trading boom to the top of the storied investment bank and steering it through the 2008 financial crisis. In his new memoir, Streetwise: Getting To and Through Goldman Sachs, he writes about his journey from public housing in Brooklyn to the pinnacle of Wall Street. So what’s he up to now? And how does he see markets and finance today? In this episode, we talk about deglobalization and Wall Street, the threats AI and tec】

item.title: 中国国有铁矿石采购商就必和必拓限制令召集贸易商
item.description: 中国国有铁矿石采购商已召集贸易商，敦促其停止购买必和必拓集团的新货运以转售给国内买家，此前发现这些贸易商违反了采购限制规定。【原文：China’s state-backed iron ore buyer has summoned traders and urged them to refrain from buying new BHP Group cargoes to sell to buyers in the country after they were found to be flouting a restriction on the purchases.】

item.title: 戈东加瓦称油价飙升威胁南非通胀
item.description: 财政部长表示，中东冲突导致油价持续走高可能助推南非通胀，但政府建立的缓冲机制应有助于维持其债务整合计划的正常推进。【原文：Sustained higher oil prices resulting from conflict in the Middle East may fuel inflation in South Africa, though the buffers built by the government should help keep its debt-consolidation plans on track, the finance minister said.】

item.title: 亚洲燃油限制；油轮遇袭：中东能源最新动态
item.description: 周四，伊朗战争的影响继续在全球能源市场引发连锁反应。【原文：The impact of the war with Iran rippled further through global energy markets on Thursday.】

item.title: 通用汽车支持的无人驾驶技术公司Momenta据称已秘密提交香港IPO申请
item.description: 据知情人士透露，北京Momenta科技有限公司已秘密提交在香港首次公开募股的申请，这为亚洲金融中心香港近期密集的股票发行活动再添一笔。【原文：Beijing Momenta Technology Co. has filed confidentially for an initial public offering in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the situation, adding to a flurry of share sales in the Asian financial hub.】

item.title: 法国农业信贷银行启动伦敦新总部选址工作
item.description: 法国农业信贷银行已开始物色英国新总部的选址方案，此举可能意味着该行将离开其近四十年的伦敦总部所在地。【原文：Crédit Agricole SA has begun scouting options for a new UK headquarters, a move that could see it depart its London home of almost four-decades.】

item.title: 内地投资者创纪录抛售35亿美元香港股票
item.description: 内地投资者单日抛售香港股票创历史新高，凸显市场对香港股票的兴趣减退，因其被视为更易受地缘政治不确定性影响。【原文：Mainland Chinese investors sold the most Hong Kong stocks in a single session on record, underscoring waning appetite for the city’s shares seen as more vulnerable to geopolitical uncertainty.】

item.title: 韩国李明博在市场波动后力推680亿美元应急基金
item.description: 韩国总统李在明周四强调了该国100万亿韩元（682亿美元）的市场稳定计划，当时首尔正面临因伊朗局势升级引发的历史性市场波动。【原文：South Korea’s President Lee Jae Myung highlighted the nation’s 100 trillion won ($68.2 billion) market stabilization program on Thursday as Seoul grappled with historic volatility tied to the escalating conflict in Iran.】

item.title: 东南水务公司因反复断水被罚款2200万英镑
item.description: 东南水务公司因2020至2023年间发生的多起供水中断事件，导致近30万用户受影响，被行业监管机构认定负有责任，现被处以2200万英镑（约合2900万美元）罚款。【原文：South East Water Ltd. was fined £22 million ($29 million) after the industry regulator blamed it for a series of supply outages that affected nearly 300,000 customers between 2020 and 2023.】

item.title: 铠侠、堂吉诃德运营商泛太平洋将加入日经225指数
item.description: 日本芯片制造商铠侠控股公司与折扣店运营商唐吉诃德运营方泛太平洋国际控股公司将于4月1日加入日经225股票指数，日经公司周四宣布。【原文：Japanese chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp. and Don Quijote discount store operator Pan Pacific International Holdings Corp. will join the Nikkei 225 stock index from Apr. 1, Nikkei Inc. said Thursday.】

item.title: Canal+旗下MultiChoice将终止亏损的Showmax平台
item.description: 法国Canal+公司将终止运营南非付费电视运营商MultiChoice集团开发的亏损流媒体服务Showmax。该服务由法国公司于去年收购。【原文：Canal+ SA will discontinue the loss-making Showmax streaming service developed by South African pay-TV operator MultiChoice Group, which the French firm bought last year.】

item.title: 英国竞争与市场管理局将审查私营牙科市场，此前该行业价格大幅上涨
item.description: 英国反垄断监管机构将对价值84亿英镑（112亿美元）的私营牙科行业展开市场调查，以评估消费者是否获得了物有所值的服务。【原文：The UK’s antitrust watchdog will carry out a market study of the £8.4 billion ($11.2 billion) private dentistry sector to assess whether consumers are getting value for money.】

item.title: 印度强力邦领导人将辞职，巩固莫迪执政地位
item.description: 纳伦德拉·莫迪在比哈尔邦的关键盟友即将卸任首席部长一职，此举可能为总理领导的执政党在这一政治要地巩固控制权创造更大空间。【原文：Narendra Modi’s key ally in Bihar is set to step down as chief minister, a move that could give the prime minister’s ruling party greater scope to consolidate its control in the politically crucial state.】

item.title: 卡塔尔启动救援航班，中东地区空域仍处于关闭状态
item.description: 卡塔尔航空公司表示，由于空中交通管制导致商业航班持续停飞，该公司今日将开通少量救援航班，协助滞留中东地区的旅客撤离。【原文：Qatar Airways said it’s starting a limited number of relief flights today to help passengers stranded in the Middle East get out, as commercial services remain suspended due to the closed airspace.】

item.title: 乌克兰战场科技公司UFORCE估值逼近10亿美元
item.description: 据知情人士透露，一家诞生于乌克兰战场的防务技术初创企业估值已突破10亿美元。随着西方及海湾国家军队争相采购经实战检验的系统，该企业正迅速崛起。【原文：A defense-technology startup born out of Ukraine’s battlefield is emerging with a valuation topping $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, as Western and Gulf militaries scramble for systems proved in combat.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格重启飙升行情，因战争扰乱能源供应链
item.description: 欧洲天然气价格重启数年来的最剧烈涨势，中东战事引发的不确定性持续冲击能源市场。【原文：European natural gas prices resumed their sharpest rally in years as uncertainty around the war in the Middle East continues to rattle energy markets.】
